scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run db:generate && npm run build:server && npm run build:client && npm run db:push
scripts.build:nodb: npm run db:generate && npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.db:push: cd server && npx prisma db push --schema=src/prisma/schema.prisma --accept-data-loss
